name: Mica - 18x24 Modern Monoslope Roof Shed | Contemporary Backyard Studio, Workshop & Storage Building (PDF)
open_features: A bold single-slope roofline creates a contemporary architectural look while allowing efficient water runoff and structural simplicity.
Clean framing lines and intuitive building geometry make the Mica Shed an excellent project for both beginner DIYers and experienced builders.
Strategically positioned doors and windows bring in natural daylight, promote airflow, and provide convenient access.
Horizontal wood siding paired with sleek trim and a lean-to roof creates a modern-rustic aesthetic that complements both traditional and contemporary homes.
description_summary: Upgrade your backyard with the Mica 18x24 Monoslope Roof Shed - a spacious, modern outdoor structure designed for efficiency, versatility, and clean architectural style. Featuring a sleek single-slope roofline, warm horizontal wood siding, and crisp contemporary detailing, Mica delivers a refined exterior while offering generous interior potential for a wide variety of uses. With 432 square feet of flexible interior space, Mica provides the perfect foundation for a backyard studio, remote off...
